video.title: Greipel sprints to victory at Stage 5 of the Paris-Nice

all_candidates.title: Greipel sprints to victory at Stage 5 of the Paris-Nice
Julian Alaphilippe secures the yellow jersey at Stage 4 of Paris-Nice
Sonny Colbrelli wins Paris-Nice 2017 stage two

transcript.clean_text: this is slightly downhill at this point they'll be touching speeds of 60 plus kmph the Yow jerseys julianella Philip just trying to stay out of trouble and making sure that he doesn't get affected by any potential splits in the pelaton Fabio satini at the front for quickstep Marcel K in the blue colors moving into the slipstream of ano dear as now we' seen Michael Matthews being brought to the front and he gets into the wheel of dear Matthew is in a prime position behind the green jersey he's perfectly placed as behind him the two Germans K and GLE are doing battle for the wheel of Matthews Another German coming through this time it's Dean Cole de Cole moves up to the shoulder of Michael Matthews it's Aro dear who's the first to break ranks but it's Dylan grunen who bur on through the Dutch national champion he was struggling over the final climb he fought his way back he now starts to fade over the top dear in the middle but it's GLE who wins GLE takes the win with limited team support in the final few kilometers they got into the last five and he finished it off for himself Andre griel all that experience coming to the four super win by the big German so reliable the 139th victory in his career he's second in parin he's had 11 in the tour to France six in the jro four in the wter 16 stage victories in the tour down n oh dear and grag in a photo finish for second and Dean cin Matthews and Magnus cour
